name: Paranormal Cleanup
short_description: Clock in for the worst cleaning shift of your life: Unclog nasty toilets and scrub ectoplasm in this 1-4 player online co-op survival horror game. Get the job done and don't get caught by the entities hunting you!
detailed_description:
This Job Sucks. You'll love it.

Paranormal Cleanup is a multiplayer horror game where up to 4 players take on the role of cleaning company employees tasked with cleaning up trash in paranormal locations. You must work together to complete your mission, all while avoiding the relentless pursuit of the entities who try to hunt you down.

Why is there Ectoplasm on the Ceiling?

The task is pretty simple - all you have to do is dispose(eat) moldy pizzas, unclog nasty toilets, scrub ectoplasm and clean up some trash here and there. But beware, entities like ghosts, cult leaders and other paranormal beings roam these places, and they're not happy about your presence. You'll need to be smart and stealthy as you clean up, as every action you take will increase the entities anger. 

When unclogging Toilets just isn't enough

  • Up to 4 Player Online Co-op Multiplayer
    Survive together with your friends or try to do it alone, if you have none

  • Proximity Voice Chat
    Nothing better than hearing your "friends" scream in the distance while you are unclogging a nasty toilet

  • So much Stuff to do - Unclog toilets, fix broken sewage pipes, scrub ectoplasm, dispose moldy pizzas.. you get the idea. You are in for a treat. 

  • 8 Unique Locations - Lots of places to clean, like Suburban Houses, whole Streets, Summer Camp, High School

  • Terrifying Enemies
    Every map features its own unique supernatural threat, ranging from ghosts to cult leaders and other paranormal entities.

  • Banish - If you feel up to it, complete optional objectives to weaken or even banish the entity hunting you, so you can clean up in peace

  • Scaling Difficulty
    Every action you take will influence the entities behavior

  • Progression System - Earn EXP and $$$, unlock and upgrade perks and new gear, unlock Outfits for your character

  • Replayability
    Each Playthrough is different. All Item and Objective Locations as well as Entity Events are randomized. 

  • Immersive 3D Audio
    Enjoy the spooky atmosphere while you hide in a closet

    Ready to get down on your Knees?

--

This game contains flashing lights that may make it unsuitable for people with photosensitive epilepsy or other photosensitive conditions. Player discretion is advised.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Spanish - Latin America, Indonesian, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
